note_text:
Subjective: Patient reports pain at Right lower extremity wound site, rates 4/10.
Objective: Wound assessment performed. Arterial arterial Right lower extremity measures 1.3 cm x 0.8 cm x 0.8 cm.
  Wound bed: 47% slough, 53% granulation tissue. Periwound: macerated.
  Drainage: moderate. Odor: present, foul.
Assessment: Arterial arterial Right lower extremity — improving.
Plan: Continue current dressing regimen. Physician notified of wound progression.

Pt seen for wound eval. Arterial Right lower extremity measures aprx 1.3 x 0.8cm, depth 0.8cm.
Min drainage serosanguineous. Heel wound also eval - L ankle 0.8x0.5, 0.4cm deep, slight serous.
Both wounds cleaned w/ NS, covered. Will follow up Mon.
